title: New SU basketball coach buys former AD’s house: Plus 130 more Onondaga County home sales
summary: Real estate transaction report covering 131 Onondaga County home sales (July 5-11, 2026). Notable sale: incoming Syracuse University basketball coach Gerry McNamara purchased a Jamesville home from former SU Athletic Director John Wildhack. Limited relevance to city innovation operations.
processing_notes: Article is primarily real estate market reporting with minimal civic innovation relevance
No budget, procurement, or policy implications identified
SU is local anchor institution but this transaction is private real estate activity
No dollar amount specified in article content
